name: Ellucian Banner Higher Education ERP API
what_it_does: Ellucian REST API for Banner higher education ERP platform. Enables AI agents to access student enrollment and academic records, retrieve financial aid data and awards, manage course registration and scheduling, access bursar and financial records, retrieve HR and payroll data for faculty and staff, integrate with learning management systems, access admissions pipeline data, manage institutional reporting, and connect student information with research and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving student enrollment and academic records from institutional analytics agents
Accessing financial aid data and award status from student services agents
Integrating Banner student data with LMS platforms from EdTech integration agents
Managing admissions pipeline data from enrollment management agents
not_for: K-12 education without higher education ERP workflows
Corporate HR without higher education context
Non-educational institutions without FERPA compliance requirements
best_when: A college or university running Ellucian Banner wants AI agents to automate student analytics, financial aid processing, LMS integration, enrollment management, and institutional reporting.
avoid_when: FERPA: Student educational records require strict FERPA compliance. Financial aid data is highly sensitive and federally regulated. Unauthorized access to student records can result in FERPA violations and loss of federal funding eligibility.

auth.notes: Ellucian uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for Ethos Integration platform. Institution-level credentials with student, HR, and finance scopes. Ethos Integration middleware layer connects Banner, Colleague, and other Ellucian products. Partner program via Ellucian App Center.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — higher education enterprise ERP pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-institution enterprise pricing; Ethos Integration platform additional cost
pricing.notes: Reston, Virginia. Founded 1968 (as SCT, rebranded Ellucian 2012). Dominant higher education ERP. 2,900+ institutions in 50+ countries. Banner (Oracle DB) and Colleague (Unidata) are flagship SIS products. Acquired by Vista Equity Partners 2015, TPG Capital 2021.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client via Ethos; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA: Student educational records require strict compliance — financial aid data especially sensitive
No public MCP server — OAuth2 via Ethos Integration middleware platform
Ethos Integration adds middleware layer — Banner/Colleague data accessed via Ethos API, not direct DB
On-premises Banner deployments have different access patterns than Ellucian Cloud
Multi-product environment — Banner (Oracle), Colleague (Unidata) have separate API surfaces unified by Ethos
Financial aid data subject to Title IV federal regulations — automation must comply with ED requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student educational records and financial aid data. FERPA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 via Ethos middleware. Multi-region data residency. Federal financial aid compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student records and financial aid. FERPA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 via Ethos middleware. Multi-region. Federal Title IV compliance.
